creator: pvh@wfeet.za.net
text:
Here's the patch

diff -cr usb/usb_quirks.c usb.old/usb_quirks.c
*** usb/usb_quirks.c    Thu May 24 00:38:29 2007
--- usb.old/usb_quirks.c        Sat Apr 28 22:31:30 2007
***************
*** 98,104 ****
   { USB_VENDOR_HP, USB_PRODUCT_HP_815C,                    ANY,   {
UQ_BROKEN_BIDIR }},
   { USB_VENDOR_HP, USB_PRODUCT_HP_810C,                    ANY,   {
UQ_BROKEN_BIDIR }},
   { USB_VENDOR_HP, USB_PRODUCT_HP_830C,                    ANY,   {
UQ_BROKEN_BIDIR }},
-  { USB_VENDOR_HP, USB_PRODUCT_HP_1010,                    ANY,   {
UQ_BROKEN_BIDIR }},
   { USB_VENDOR_HP, USB_PRODUCT_HP_1220C,                   ANY,   {
UQ_BROKEN_BIDIR }},
   { USB_VENDOR_XEROX, USB_PRODUCT_XEROX_WCM15,     ANY,   {
UQ_BROKEN_BIDIR }},
   /* YAMAHA router's ucdDevice is the version of farmware and often
changes. */
--- 98,103 ----
diff -cr usb/usbdevs usb.old/usbdevs
*** usb/usbdevs Thu May 24 00:36:48 2007
--- usb.old/usbdevs     Sun May 20 14:34:39 2007
***************
*** 1017,1023 ****
  product HP 810C                       0x0304  DeskJet 810C/812C
  product HP 4300C              0x0305  Scanjet 4300C
  product HP G85XI              0x0311  OfficeJet G85xi
- product HP 1010                       0x0c17  LaserJet 1010
  product HP 1200                       0x0317  LaserJet 1200
  product HP 5200C              0x0401  Scanjet 5200C
  product HP 830C                       0x0404  DeskJet 830C
--- 1017,1022 ----
